description: Higher low on the back-up to the edge of the creek after a Sign of Strength, with narrowing spread and reduced volume confirming demand control.
allowed_actions: Ladder spot buys in defined LPS band
Maintain futures overlay; derisk only at TP1/TP2
Place stops below LPS low / creek support
risk_notes: Treat as A-Class long area; size according to volatility and distance to LPS low.

description: Pullback from a Sign of Strength into the breakout zone, retesting prior resistance as new support, often on declining volume and narrower spreads.
allowed_actions: Monitor behaviour of pullback; no full-size entries until LPS is confirmed
Prepare ladder levels within the back-up band
Stand aside if back-up re-enters and fails the creek
risk_notes: Back-up may fail and drop back into the creek; treat as test zone.

description: Climactic push above resistance in a distribution range, followed by swift rejection and entry back into the structure.
allowed_actions: Allow shorts to engage once break and test confirm
Use rallies back towards UTAD for risk-controlled exits
risk_notes: Aggressive fading of UTAD carries high risk; confirmation is required.
